title: Notodanthonia craigii
taxonomy: Notodanthonia craigii is classified within the family Poaceae. It is a species of grass. The genus Notodanthonia is part of the tribe Danthonieae. This species is native to New Zealand and is known to be a rare and endangered plant. It is often found growing in the wild in mountainous and alpine regions.
benefits: Notodanthonia craigii is a plant species that has been found to have various potential health benefits.
